name: The Velvet Room
subtitle: Someone always wins here. Tonight it isn't you.
description: A classic underground casino. Jazz plays softly. The danger feels distant.

boss_rule.name: House Advantage
boss_rule.description: 0 pays nothing this round. The house keeps it.
boss_rule.flavor: They smiled when they told you.

name: The Iron Parlour
subtitle: Gears turn. Odds shift. The wheel never forgets.
description: Victorian steampunk. Mechanical wheels. Secret society symbols on every wall.

boss_rule.name: Odd Numbered Curse
boss_rule.description: All odd numbers pay half their normal winnings.
boss_rule.flavor: The Brotherhood of the Wheel plays by different rules.

name: The Neon Purgatory
subtitle: The lights flicker. The wheel glitches. Nothing is real.
description: Cyberpunk arcade casino. Digital corruption bleeds through the walls.

boss_rule.name: System Lockout
boss_rule.description: Straight-up bets are disabled. Only outside bets allowed.

name: The Sunken Hall
subtitle: Ancient. Watching. Hungry.
description: Underwater. Bioluminescent. The old gods invented gambling long before you.

boss_rule.name: Rising Tide
boss_rule.description: The target score increases by 200 with each spin taken.

name: The Devil's Floor
subtitle: You made a deal. Now pay.
description: Hell. The wheel is a ring of fire. The Devil is the dealer. One last game.

boss_rule.name: The Devil's Deal
boss_rule.description: Every loss costs you an extra 20 chips. Every win doubles.
boss_rule.flavor: Did you really think you could beat the house in Hell?
